title: Roma Tomatoes
description: Roma (or plum) tomatoes are egg-shaped  and narrow with a thick red skin and meaty texture. Because they have few seeds and a sweet flavour, Roma tomatoes are a popular choice for making tomato paste and sauce. They can also be used raw in salads or roasted for lasagna and pasta.

title: Mango
description: Mangoes have a firm, fibrous orange flesh and sweet flavour. Their skin is typically greenish-yellow with a red blush covering most of it, but colour isn’t a reliable way of way of testing for ripeness. Instead, squeeze the mango gently. If it’s ripe it will give slightly. Enjoy mango on its own, in fruit salad, or chutney.

title: Cilantro
description: Cilantro is the bunched leafy green from the coriander plant. It has a distinctive flavour and fragrance that some describe as “soapy”.  Both the leaves and stems can be used raw or cooked in a variety of dishes. Cilantro works especially well with spicy food. Try it with curry chicken or add some to salsa with a little lime.

title: Garlic Bulbs, 3-count
description: Don't forget to add Garlic Bulbs to your weekly shopping list. The pack includes 3 bulbs, so you'll always be prepared when you make soups, stews, pizza, or your favourite stir fry.

title: Ginger
description: Ginger (or gingerroot) has a tough tan skin and a fresh spicy fragrance. Ginger can be grated, slivered, or ground and its peppery flavour is used in a variety of dishes. Dried ground ginger has a very different taste and is not a suitable replacement for fresh. Peel gingerroot and add fresh to dressings and marinades, or cook in a stir-fry or soup.

title: Colossal Garlic
description: Garlic has a plump bulb (or head) of individual cloves each covered with a thin skin that can be peeled. Heads of garlic can be roasted whole and the individual cloves can be crushed, chopped, pressed, puréed, or sliced. Try eating fresh parsley after a meal containing garlic to help control odour.

description:

title: Red Onions, 3 lb Bag
description: Red (or Italian) onions have a reddish-purple papery skin and a mild sweet flavour. Use red onions to add colour and flavour to just about any dish. Slices of raw red onion work well in salads and as a topping for burgers, or roast and serve with sausage or flank steak.

title: Jalapeno Peppers
description: Jalapeno peppers are slightly rounded chilies with smooth green skin that turns red when ripe. Jalapenos are popular because of their flavour and because they are easy to seed. Add jalapeno peppers to sauces and salsas. Scoville scale rating of 2,500 – 8,000.

title: Tortilla Chips Salted
description: Our most salty chip, but not so much salt that you feel gross after. Not too thick, and not too thin for a perfect crunch. We created Que Pasa because we wanted a chip that was real – just a few, simple ingredients, minimally processed for an authentic and wholesome taste without feeling the greasy heaviness that come from most other corn chips that are made from highly processed and refined corn flour. Keeping it real also means keeping it pure – so we use only the highest quality organic, non-GMO ingredients in all of our products. And because authenticity is everything, Que Pasa’s tortilla chips are made the traditional Mexican way – whole organic corn kernels ground between hand-cut volcanic rock.

title: Colombian Supremo Single Origin Medium Roast Single Serve Coffee Pods
description:
Have you ever sipped a supremo at sunrise? This 100% arabica coffee from Columbia is Rainforest Alliance Certified* and was grown at an elevation up to 1,800 metres—at higher elevations, it takes longer for coffee cherry fruit to mature, resulting in a coffee with more complex sugars and deeper, more nuanced flavours. This coffee is called Supremo because of the size of the coffee beans it comes from—these are large, crowd-pleasing coffee beans with notes of sweet, dried fruit, citrus and nut, with balanced body and acidity. Medium roasted to perfection in Canada, it comes packed in our 100% compostable** coffee pods.

*The Rainforest Alliance supports sustainable coffee farming practices. Learn more at www.ra.org.**For collection in municipal programs. These coffee pods may not be accepted for composting in your area. Check with your local municipality for more information.

title: EXCELLENCE Chili Dark Chocolate Bar
description:
Experience a sweet-and-spicy taste sensation with the Lindt EXCELLENCE Chili Dark Chocolate Bar. Infused with natural chili pepper, this smooth and creamy dark chocolate bar starts sweet and builds to a spicy yet mellow finish that lingers on your palate. From its silky shine to the crisp snap of perfectly tempered chocolate, the Lindt EXCELLENCE collection offers a decadent and full sensory chocolate experience. Since 1845, Lindt Maître Chocolatiers have brought skill and passion to producing quality Swiss chocolate. Lindt is one of the only large-scale chocolate makers in the world to oversee every step in its chocolate-making process. Through its innovative farming program, Lindt can trace every cacao bean used back to its farm of origin, ensuring that only the finest ingredients are used, and guaranteeing extraordinary chocolate flavour in every bite. Make sure to store all Lindt chocolate in a cool, dry place to ensure quality.

  • Package contains one 100g dark chocolate bar with chili pepper
  • From superior cacao beans to exquisite chocolate, Lindt meticulously controls every step in its chocolate-making process
  • Each of Lindt’s delicious flavour combinations are crafted with only the finest quality ingredients
  • This chili chocolate bar is perfect savoured on its own or paired with a glass of ruby port

description: Reach for Club House Minute Tapioca to whip up a delicious, gluten-free tapioca pudding dessert in minutes. An excellent thickener, it’s also a convenient ingredient for fruit pies, dessert sauces, and syrups. Tapioca is gluten-free and kosher certified. Tapioca is made from cassava or manioc, a tuber like the yam, that is a staple food in the Tropics, India, and South America. Tapioca granules are actual grains of fine cassava starch that swell in size when heated. Minute Tapioca can be prepared on your stovetop or in the microwave with a few simple pantry ingredients like sugar, salt, milk, egg, and Club House Pure Vanilla Extract.

title: SWISS CLASSIC Gold Hazelnut Milk Chocolate Bar
description:
Indulge in decadent Lindt milk chocolate with the perfect texture with the Lindt SWISS CLASSIC Gold Hazelnut Milk Chocolate Bar. This gourmet milk chocolate bar delivers the delicious combination rich, creamy milk chocolate blended with whole hazelnuts that are gently roasted to nutty, crunchy perfection. Packaged in an elegant gold wrapper, this large chocolate bar, which offers three times more chocolate to savour compared to a regular Lindt bar, makes a perfect gift or a delicious addition to your baking. Since 1845, Lindt Maître Chocolatiers have brought passion and pride to producing gourmet Swiss chocolate. Premium chocolate begins with premium ingredients, and Lindt is one of the only large-scale chocolate makers in the world to oversee every step in its chocolate-making process. Through its innovative farming program, Lindt can trace every cacao bean used back to its farm of origin, ensuring that only the finest ingredients are used, and guaranteeing extraordinary chocolate flavour in every bite. Make sure to store all Lindt chocolate in a cool, dry place to ensure quality.

  • Package contains one 300g milk chocolate bar with whole roasted hazelnuts
  • From superior cacao beans to exquisite chocolate, Lindt meticulously controls every step in its chocolate-making process
  • Each of Lindt’s delicious flavour combinations are crafted with only the finest quality ingredients
  • This gourmet chocolate bar in an elegant gold wrapper is perfect for sharing, gift giving, and baking
  • To ensure quality, always store Lindt chocolate in a cool, dry place

title: PC® Costa Rica Single Origin Medium Roast Fine Grind Coffee
description:
Wake up to this 100% arabica coffee from Costa Rica that is Rainforest Alliance Certified*. It was grown at an elevation of at least 1,200 metres—at higher elevations, it takes longer for coffee cherry fruit to mature, resulting in a coffee with more complex sugars and deeper, more nuanced flavours. Your cup will taste sweet and nutty, with balanced body and acidity. Medium roasted to perfection in Canada, it comes packed in our award-winning, recyclable packaging**.

Brew tip: This grind size is best for flat-bottomed filter coffee and pour-overs.

*The Rainforest Alliance supports sustainable coffee farming practices. Learn more at www.ra.org.**Our recyclable packaging is made with a minimum 80% paper content—freshness seal is not recyclable.

Whether you’re kicking back with family, watching the game, or just treating yourself to something truly delicious, Ruffles potato chips always hit the spot. title: Strawberry Frozen Dessert
description:
Breyers Classic Strawberry frozen dessert is made with high-quality ingredients for a tasty frozen treat with the fresh flavour of strawberries. When you taste Breyers Family Classic Strawberry, you'll remember the familiar childhood feeling of running to the ice cream truck. Breyers Classic Strawberry is a deliciously creamy addition to your favourite dessert, or perfect on its own as a snack. Crafted in a Canadian creamery with 100% Canadian dairy, this delicious frozen dessert is made using only flavours and colours from natural sources, like all Breyers ice creams and frozen desserts. An absolute must in every freezer, it's the perfect sweet treat or snack for every day of the week.

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian dairy. Breyers is proudly crafted in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Classic Strawberry Frozen Dessert is made with high-quality ingredients for a tasty frozen snack with the fresh flavour of strawberries
  • Made with real ingredients and all natural colours and flavour, it's the perfect sweet snack or complement to your favourite dessert
  • All Breyers ice cream and frozen desserts are proudly made in Canada, at our creamery in Simcoe, Ontario
  • Breyers frozen desserts are made in accordance with our Breyers Pledge, starting with only high-quality ingredients.
  • Made in Canada with 100% Canadian Dairy from Canadian farms.
  • This delicious Breyers frozen dessert is kosher certified.

description:
Have you ever sipped a supremo at sunrise? This coffee is called Supremo because of the size of the coffee beans it comes from—these are large, crowd-pleasing coffee beans with notes of sweet, dried fruit, citrus and nut, with balanced body and acidity. Medium roasted to perfection in Canada, it comes packed in our award-winning, recyclable packaging**.

Brew tip: This grind size is best for flat-bottomed filter coffee and pour-overs.

*The Rainforest Alliance supports sustainable coffee farming practices. Learn more at www.ra.org.**Our recyclable packaging is made with a minimum 80% paper content—freshness seal is not recyclable.

title: Natural Spring Water
description: The origins of evian natural spring water dates back thousands of years to the very birth of the French Alps. Over several ice ages, a natural filter developed, creating a one of a kind haven for the planet's most precious treasure. Each drop of evian starts off as rain or snow high up on the pristine peaks of the French Alps, traveling through a vast mineral aquifer deep within the mountains before emerging at last at the spring in Evian-Les-Bains. This amazing journey is the secret to Evian water's purity and it takes over 15 years. Throughout this process, evian is filtered naturally, giving it the purity, mineral content, and taste that nature intended. Perfect for staying hydrated throughout the day

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian milk and cream. Breyers is proudly made in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

title: Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Light Ice Cream
description:
Discover the joy of less bake time and more playtime with Breyers Creamery Style Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Light Ice Cream! This delightful treat combines chunks of chewy chocolate chip cookie dough with Breyers' signature creamy vanilla ice cream, creating a chunky, chewy sensation that will please your taste buds with every bite. Our Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Light Ice Cream is not only irresistibly delicious but also crafted with high-quality ingredients. The rich vanilla base perfectly complements the generous chunks of cookie dough and chocolate chips, making it a treat that stands out in both flavour and texture. Enjoy it on its own or pair it with your favourite dessert for a delightful experience. Whether it’s a cozy family night or a special celebration, it is a treat everyone will love.

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice creamand frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian milk and cream. Breyers is proudly made in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Creamery Style Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Light Ice Cream contains chewy chocolate chip cookie dough chunks and a delicious creamy vanilla base

title: Natural Spring Water
description: The origins of evian natural spring water dates back thousands of years to the very birth of the French Alps. Over several ice ages, a natural filter developed, creating a one of a kind haven for the planet's most precious treasure. Each drop of evian starts off as rain or snow high up on the pristine peaks of the French Alps, traveling through a vast mineral aquifer deep within the mountains before emerging at last at the spring in Evian-Les-Bains. This amazing journey is the secret to Evian water's purity and it takes over 15 years. Throughout this process, evian is filtered naturally, giving it the purity, mineral content, and taste that nature intended. Perfect for staying hydrated throughout the day

title: Roasted Garlic Zero Salt Bouillon Powder
description:
• Knorr Zero Salt Roasted Garlic Bouillon Powder brings out the rich flavour in food while allowing you to break free from salt.
  • With an expert blend of real vegetables, spices, and herbs this roasted garlic bouillon gives you all the great flavour with no salt, delivering authentic taste you can feel good about.
  • Known for its wholesome flavours, Knorr Zero Salt Powder Bouillon contains no artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives.
  • To prepare a delicious roasted garlic broth without salt, dissolve 1 teaspoon (5 ml) of Knorr Zero Salt Roasted Garlic Powder Bouillon in 1 cup (250 ml) of boiling water.
  • This plant-based roasted garlic flavoured bouillon is both versatile and flavourful. Get ready to create delicious no salt soups, stews, sauces, or use it as a seasoning!
  • This Zero Salt Bouillon is perfect to make quick and easy recipes like the Knorr Garlic Roasted Potatoes, visit Knorr.ca to start cooking!

New Knorr Zero Salt Roasted Garlic Powder Bouillon proves that zero salt does NOT mean zero flavour! Made with an expert blend of vegetables, herbs, and spices, this plant-based roasted garlic bouillon gives you all the flavour with none of the salt, delivering authenticity you can feel good about. This bouillon powder is made with real vegetables, herbs and spices, like carrots, onion and parsley, and is made with absolutely no artificial flavours or preservatives. Packaged in a 100% post-consumer recycled jar, this powder bouillon gives you total control of the flavour of your dishes without the worry of salt. To prepare a delicious garlic broth, dissolve 1 teaspoon (5 ml) of Knorr Zero Salt Roasted Garlic Bouillon in 1 cup (250 ml) of boiling water. Since there is zero salt, you can use as desired to enhance the flavour of your favourite soups, stews, sauces, and pasta to name a few! This roasted garlic flavoured bouillon is a versatile seasoning for all your favourite dishes. Knorr Zero Salt Bouillon comes in a variety of delicious flavours, including Chicken and Beef. Discover more quick and delicious ways to use Knorr Zero Salt Bouillon. Knorr believes that good food matters, and everyday meals can be just as magical as special occasions. Knorr products owe their taste and flavours to the culinary skills and passion of its chefs. Whether it's creating high-quality ingredients, offering simple chef-developed recipes, or supporting organizations and initiatives that provide access to healthy foods, Knorr remains committed to its long history of making good food available to everyone.

title: Calorie-Free Sweetener from the Stevia Leaf Spoonable Jar
description:
We believe sweetness was meant to be enjoyed. That's why we created products that allow you to reduce sugar, not flavour. The clean, sweet flavour contained in Truvia Calorie-Free Sweetener Spoonable comes from nature in the form of the stevia leaf. Leaves don't dissolve well in beverages or baked goods, so we extract the sweetness from the stevia leaf. Because stevia leaf extract is 200x sweeter than sugar, we balance the sweetness with erythritol, a sweetener produced by fermentation. Erythritol is also found in fruits like grapes and pears. This gives you the white crystals you're used to without the calories. The lid opens to allow for measuring spoons to scoop up the sweetness you need when cooking. Whether you spoon it, pour it, or sprinkle it, this Spoonable jar is great for measuring just the right amount of sweetness you crave.

  • Calorie-free sugar substitute made with stevia leaf extract, erythritol, and natural flavours
  • Jar contains 180 servings of Truvia calorie-free stevia sweetener at 1/3 teaspoon each
  • 1/3 teaspoon provides the same sweetness as 1 teaspoon of sugar
  • Non-GMO, guten-free, sugar-free, kosher, plant-based stevia sweetness, no artificial sweeteners, and suitable for people with diabetes
  • Spoon into anything from your coffee, tea, fruit, cereal and yogurt to your favourite recipes

Living Food for the Living Body..

Breyers is proudly made in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

title: Calorie-Free Sweetener from the Stevia Leaf Spoonable Jar
description:
We believe sweetness was meant to be enjoyed. That's why we created products that allow you to reduce sugar, not flavour. The clean, sweet flavour contained in Truvia Calorie-Free Sweetener Spoonable comes from nature in the form of the stevia leaf. Leaves don't dissolve well in beverages or baked goods, so we extract the sweetness from the stevia leaf. Because stevia leaf extract is 200x sweeter than sugar, we balance the sweetness with erythritol, a sweetener produced by fermentation. Erythritol is also found in fruits like grapes and pears. This gives you the white crystals you're used to without the calories. The lid opens to allow for measuring spoons to scoop up the sweetness you need when cooking. Whether you spoon it, pour it, or sprinkle it, this Spoonable jar is great for measuring just the right amount of sweetness you crave.

  • Calorie-free sugar substitute made with stevia leaf extract, erythritol, and natural flavours
  • Jar contains 180 servings of Truvia calorie-free stevia sweetener at 1/3 teaspoon each
  • 1/3 teaspoon provides the same sweetness as 1 teaspoon of sugar
  • Non-GMO, guten-free, sugar-free, kosher, plant-based stevia sweetness, no artificial sweeteners, and suitable for people with diabetes
  • Spoon into anything from your coffee, tea, fruit, cereal and yogurt to your favourite recipes

Sprinkle on scrambled eggs or tomato soup, or rub onto chicken, fish or pork. It adds smoky intensity to seasoning rubs for heartier cuts of meat for roasting or grilling. Get creative and add this irresistible smoky-sweet taste to chili, sweet potatoes, beans, roasted vegetables and meatless dishes. title: Cayenne Pepper
description: Originally from the New World, cayenne pepper is well traveled- it can be found in cuisines around the globe, wherever a little fire is needed to perk up the taste buds. Use to liven up every day dishes, dips, salsas, barbecue sauce, wings and even desserts. Cayenne pepper is a member of the Capsicum family which also includes bell pepper, paprika and jalapeños. Cayenne peppers have a high level of capsaicin, the component that adds the pungent heat and bite to your dishes. A pinch will turn your burgers into firecrackers, spice up seafood stew, or supercharge a mango salsa or chili. Whichever cuisine you’re cooking, from Cajun and Mexican to Indian and Thai, cayenne pepper delivers fiery flavour that keeps you coming back bite after bite.

title: Cayenne Pepper
description: Originally from the New World, cayenne pepper is well traveled- it can be found in cuisines around the globe, wherever a little fire is needed to perk up the taste buds. Use to liven up every day dishes, dips, salsas, barbecue sauce, wings and even desserts. Cayenne pepper is a member of the Capsicum family which also includes bell pepper, paprika and jalapeños. Cayenne peppers have a high level of capsaicin, the component that adds the pungent heat and bite to your dishes. A pinch will turn your burgers into firecrackers, spice up seafood stew, or supercharge a mango salsa or chili. Whichever cuisine you’re cooking, from Cajun and Mexican to Indian and Thai, cayenne pepper delivers fiery flavour that keeps you coming back bite after bite.

Made in Canada with 100% Canadian milk.Since 1881, Balderson has been dedicated to aging premium cheese in Ontario. While the world has evolved, our commitment to quality and craftsmanship remains unchanged. Balderson cheese is a premium brand cherished by Canadians for over 140 years, known for its exceptional taste and meticulous attention to detail.

Rich cocoa and hazelnut are just two of the things that makes Breyers Classic Chocolate Hazelnut frozen dessert a family classic. An absolute must in every freezer, it's the perfect sweet treat or snack for every day of the week.

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian dairy. Breyers is proudly crafted in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Family Classic Chocolate Hazelnut Frozen Dessert is made with real cocoa and hazelnuts for a classic taste the whole family will love
  • Made with real ingredients and all natural colours and flavour, it's the perfect complement to your favourite dessert.
  • All Breyers ice cream and frozen desserts are proudly made in Canada, at our creamery in Simcoe, Ontario

title: Jasmine Rice
description:
BEN'S ORIGINAL Jasmine Rice serves as a great base in a variety of family meals. This flavourful, fragrant jasmine rice not only smells amazing in your kitchen, but it also cooks to perfection and is ready to be added to any meal no matter how simple or elaborate. Enjoy it as part of an entree or as a side dish with your favourite protein or vegetable. For more options, use this rice to make delicious Pad Kra Pao, or use this fragrant rice as the base in a spicy Thai Curry. This 100% natural jasmine rice is sourced from Thailand, making it easy to create authentic, delicious recipes family and friends are sure to love. To prepare, place your rice in a saucepan with boiling water, then let it simmer for 10 minutes. Once done, simply fluff your freshly cooked rice with a fork and serve your family a yummy, nutritious meal. BEN'S ORIGINAL brand is dedicated to creating meals and experiences that offer everyone a seat at the table.
  • One 460g bag of BEN'S ORIGINAL Jasmine Rice

The day's been a whirlwind and it's far from over. But here's the thing — you're not stressing it. Because you've got it all figured out. You're gonna brew the medium roast made for kicking back and enjoying the aroma. Maxwell House House Blend Coffee Certified Compostable K-Cup® Coffee Pods. Just sit back and savour every sip from your steaming cup full of strong, full-bodied Maxwell House flavour. Reset with that consistently delicious taste that hits the spot from the very first sip to the very last drop. And when that cup's empty and you're finally fueled up...You can squint your eyes, gather your gear and roll up your sleeves, because now, you're ready to tackle anything and there’s plenty of K-Cup® Coffee Pods ready to recharge you in your 30 count box of Maxwell House House Blend Coffee Certified Compostable K-Cup® Coffee Pods. Let's show 'em what you're made of. Maxwell House. To Your Max.

  • Full flavoured and lively from the first sip to the last
  • A consistently great taste that you can brew to take your day to your max

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian milk and cream. title: Non-Dairy Strawberry Cheezecake Frozen Dessert
description:
Ben & Jerry's Strawberry Cheezecake Non-Dairy frozen dessert and certified vegan pint. All the culinary delight of your favourite fruit-topped cheesecake, without the dairy! Ben & Jerry’s Strawberry Cheezecake Non-Dairy frozen dessert is made with oat milk, so it’s 100% vegan and 110% delicious. With strawberry cheesecake non-dairy frozen dessert and thick, decadent graham cracker swirls, it’s a tOATally titillating treat that might just become your new go-to pint. One of our favourite things to do in the Ben & Jerry’s test kitchen is experiment with turning delicious desserts into scoopable sweets. And we couldn’t wait to tackle strawberry cheesecake, a treat so tasty that we can’t resist ordering it every time we see it on restaurant dessert menus. We kept the creamy, dreamy cheesecake flavour, the sweet pops of strawberry, and the heavenly graham cracker swirls. But we swapped the dairy for oat milk to make this pint fully vegan. Rich and creamy oat milk is a perfect blank canvas for our Non-Dairy creations. Follow the thick graham crackers as you enjoy bite after bite of this dairy-free take on the classic restaurant favourite! Ben & Jerry’s Strawberry Cheezecake Non-Dairy is made with non-GMO sourced ingredients, including Fairtrade Certified sugar. Plus, it comes in responsibly sourced packaging, so you can feel good about every taste-bud-tingling bite!

• Ben & Jerry's Non-Dairy Frozen Dessert certified vegan pint flavours have a NEW smooth & creamy recipe made with Oat Milk!
• Ben & Jerry's Strawberry Cheezecake Non-dairy frozen dessert is made with oat milk, so it’s 100% vegan with decadent graham cracker swirls.
• Ben & Jerry's Non-Dairy frozen desserts is gmo free with certified vegan ingredients and Fairtrade certified sugar, cocoa, and vanilla and comes to you in bananas, coffee, cocoa, sugar, & vanilla.
• Ben & Jerry's Non-Dairy Frozen Desserts are certified Kosher-DE.
• Ben & Jerry’s ice cream and non-dairy frozen desserts use responsibly sourced packaging.
• For Strawberry Cheesecake fans who favour a non-dairy flavour, we've created an OAT-based version that's still jam packed with strawberry cheesecake greatness & a fantastic graham cracker swirl.

title: Garlic Powder
description: The savoury flavour of McCormick Gourmet® Garlic Powder is the perfect addition to any dish- literally. Its mellow, round taste enhances soups, sauces and marinades to stews and stir-fries, and everything in between.Garlic is a member of the lily family and cousin to leeks, chives, onions and shallots. Our garlic powder begins with whole heads of best-quality garlic grown in rich soil with plenty of sunshine. We remove the papery husk and gently dry the cloves before grinding them to a powder that will easily rehydrate and disperse in your recipe. With garlic powder you have a convenient seasoning in hand for adding rich deep flavour. Substitute 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder for every clove of fresh garlic.

title: Chocolate Frozen Dessert
description:
Rich cocoa makes Breyers Classic Chocolate frozen dessert a creamy family classic. When you taste Breyers Family Classic Chocolate, you remember the familiar childhood feeling of running to the ice cream truck! Grab a scoop and indulge in this frozen dessert that pairs perfectly with all your favourite desserts. Crafted in a Canadian creamery with 100% Canadian dairy, this delicious frozen dessert is made using only natural and sustainably sourced chocolate and cocoa beans. An absolute must in every freezer, it's the perfect sweet treat or snack for every day of the week.

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian dairy. Breyers is proudly crafted in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Family Classic Chocolate Frozen Dessert is made with real cocoa for a classic taste the whole family will love.
  • Made with real ingredients and all natural colours and flavour, it's the perfect complement to your favourite dessert.
  • All Breyers ice cream and frozen desserts are proudly made in Canada, at our creamery in Simcoe, Ontario
  • Breyers frozen desserts are made in accordance with our Breyers Pledge, starting with only high-quality ingredients.
  • Made in Canada with 100% Canadian Dairy from Canadian farms.
  • This delicious Breyers frozen dessert is kosher certified.

title: Rice
description: Nitrogen flushed for freshnessResealable.Top grade US#1California premiumThe original calroseFirst in quality - First in taste since 1950Kokuho® Rice is premium California medium-grain rice, with a proud legacy that reaches back more than 70 years. In 1948 the California Rice Experiment Station developed calrose, a medium-grain rice uniquely suited to California's growing conditions. It was Nomura & Company, in collaboration with Koda Farms, who first recognized the distinctive quality of the calrose variety. They became champions for large-scale production, and developed national and international markets under the Kokuho® brand. To this day, Nomura selects only the best calrose for its renowned Kokuho® Rice - from the beginning, unmatched for quality and taste. Often imitated, never equaled!

Whether you're hosting a family gathering, celebrating a special occasion, or simply enjoying a quiet evening at home, this ice cream is sure to bring smiles to everyone around.

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian milk and cream. Breyers is proudly made in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Creamery Style Butterscotch Ripple Light Ice Cream is made with fresh cream swirled with ribbons of rich real butterscotch flavour
  • Made with real ingredients and all natural colours and flavour, it's the perfect sweet snack or complement to your favourite dessert
  • All Breyers ice cream and frozen desserts are proudly made in Canada, at our creamery in Simcoe, Ontario
  • Breyers ice cream is made in accordance with our Breyers Pledge, starting with only high-quality ingredients.

title: Butterscotch Ripple Light Ice Cream
description:
Discover the delightful taste of Breyers Creamery Style Butterscotch Ripple Light Ice Cream, a treat that promises to make every moment special. Crafted with fresh cream and swirled with ribbons of rich, real butterscotch flavour, this light ice cream is perfect for enjoying on its own or as a complement to your favourite dessert. Made right here in Canada, Breyers Creamery Style Butterscotch Ripple Light Ice Cream offers a creamy, smooth texture that melts in your mouth, delivering a joyful taste experience with every spoonful. Whether you're hosting a family gathering, celebrating a special occasion, or simply enjoying a quiet evening at home, this ice cream is sure to bring smiles to everyone around.

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian milk and cream. Breyers is proudly made in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Creamery Style Butterscotch Ripple Light Ice Cream is made with fresh cream swirled with ribbons of rich real butterscotch flavour
  • Made with real ingredients and all natural colours and flavour, it's the perfect sweet snack or complement to your favourite dessert
  • All Breyers ice cream and frozen desserts are proudly made in Canada, at our creamery in Simcoe, Ontario
  • Breyers ice cream is made in accordance with our Breyers Pledge, starting with only high-quality ingredients.
  • Breyers Creamery Style Light Ice Cream is made from naturally sourced flavours and colours

title: Cookies & Cream Light Ice Cream
description:
Craving something sweet but can't decide between cookies or ice cream? Why not enjoy the best of both worlds with Breyers Creamery Style Cookies & Cream Light Ice Cream! Enjoy it on its own or pair it with your favourite dessert for a delightful experience. Whether it’s a cozy family night or a special celebration, it is a treat everyone will love.

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian milk and cream. Breyers is proudly made in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Cookies & Cream Light Ice Cream combines your love for vanilla with heaps of crème-filled chocolate cookie pieces.
  • Made with real ingredients and all natural colours and flavour, it's the perfect sweet snack or complement to your favourite dessert
  • All Breyers ice cream and frozen desserts are proudly made in Canada, at our creamery in Simcoe, Ontario
  • Breyers ice cream is made in accordance with our Breyers Pledge, starting with only high-quality ingredients.
  • Made in Canada with 100% Canadian milk and fresh cream from Canadian farms.
  • This delicious Breyers frozen dessert is kosher certified.

title: Hickory Smoked Classic Cut Bacon
description:
Schneiders® Hickory Smoked Classic Cut Bacon proves that when it comes to great bacon, there are no shortcuts for time and care. It starts with the highest-quality pork belly, the ideal balance of salt and cane sugar in the brine, and a special mix of North American hickory and applewood for smoking. title: Organic Carnival Tortilla Chips
description: A fiesta-style fun mix of our three popular varieties – blue, red and white salted chips. Not too thick, and not too thin, for the most perfect crunch. Keeping it real also means keeping it pure – so we use only the highest quality organic, non-GMO ingredients in all of our products. And because authenticity is everything, Que Pasa’s tortilla chips are made the traditional Mexican way – whole organic corn kernels ground between hand-cut volcanic rock.

title: Nabob Medium Roast 1896 Tradition Ground Coffee
description:
Explore the flavours of the world from your home with Nabob Ground Coffee. Nabob Medium Roast 1896 Tradition Ground Coffee is made from sustainably sourced 100% Arabica beans. Our recyclable* canister packaging is made with 80% paper-fiber from renewable resources (*excludes freshness seal). To prepare, use two level tablespoons of ground coffee per 8 oz (250 mL) of cold, fresh and filtered water. The flavour-lock pack keeps your coffee fresh in between cups. For optimal freshness, brew the coffee within a week of opening the package. Proudly roasted and packaged in Ontario, Canada, our coffee is Certified Kosher. Ever since our beginnings back in 1896, the Nabob Coffee Co. continues to fuel our passion for coffee, our communities and the environment.

title: Fish & Chips Batter
description: Quick and easy every time! Just add beer to make this great tasting batter. Coats heavily and fries to a crisp golden brown. All You Need: • vegetable oil • 2/3 cup (150 mL) cold beer or cold water • 1 – ½ lb (750 g) fresh or thawed fish or seafood, patted dry All You Do: 1. Preheat vegetable oil in deep fryer to 375°F (190°C) or preheat 1/2 inch (1 cm) vegetable oil in a skillet on medium-high heat. 2. Whisk together one pouch of batter mix and beer in medium bowl until smooth. 3. Dip fish pieces in batter. Tap gently on side of bowl to remove excess batter. 4. Deep fry or pan fry, several at a time, for 2-3 minutes, turning as needed until golden brown. Remove and drain on paper towel. Fish is done when it flakes easily with a fork. Serve with Club House* Golden Dipt® Original or Low Fat Tartar Sauce for a taste the whole family will love!

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian dairy. Breyers is proudly crafted in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Family Classic Vanilla Frozen Dessert is made from real vanilla beans and all natural colours and flavours for a classic taste the whole family will love
  • Made with real ingredients and all natural colours and flavour, it's the perfect sweet snack or complement to your favourite dessert

title: Calorie-Free Sweetener from the Stevia Leaf Sachets/Packets
description:
We believe sweetness was meant to be enjoyed. That's why we created products that allow you to reduce sugar, not flavour. The clean, sweet flavour contained in Truvia Calorie-Free Sweetener sachets/packets comes from nature in the form of the stevia leaf. Leaves don't dissolve well in beverages or baked goods, so we extract the sweetness from the stevia leaf. Because stevia leaf extract is 200x sweeter than sugar, we balance the sweetness with erythritol, a sweetener produced by fermentation. Erythritol is also found in fruits like grapes and pears. This gives you the white crystals you're used to without the calories. This 140-count box is just the right size to fit on your counter or in your pantry.

  • Calorie-free sugar substitute made with stevia leaf extract, erythritol, and natural flavours
  • Carton contains 140 sachets/packets of Truvia Calorie-Free Sweetener
  • One sachet provides the same sweetness as 2 teaspoons of sugar
  • Non-GMO, gluten-free, sugar-free, kosher, plant-based stevia sweetness, no artificial sweeteners, and suitable for people with diabetes or following carb-conscious diets such as Keto (Ketogenic)

Use Orzo in soup or pasta salad, or as a replacement for rice. For a surprising twist, substitute Barilla Orzo for Arborio rice in your next risotto – it has all the firm "al dente" texture of traditional Arborio to make a creamy risotto, and its delightful shape and taste add a new dimension to a traditional favorite. title: 0 Non-Alcoholic Draught Beer
description:
Guinness 0 boasts a beautifully smooth taste, perfectly balanced flavor, and unique dark color, similar to Guinness Draught, brewed to be non-alcoholic.

To create Guinness 0 the St James’s Gate brewers, start by brewing Guinness exactly as they always have, using the same natural ingredients; water, barley, hops, and yeast; before gently removing the alcohol through a cold filtration method. The cold filtration process allows the alcohol to be filtered out without presenting thermal stress to the beer, protecting the integrity of its taste and character. The brewers then carefully blend and balance the flavors to ensure the distinctive flavor profile and taste characteristics of Guinness.

The resulting product is a non-alcoholic stout that is unmistakably Guinness, inspired by the same dark, ruby red liquid and creamy head, hints of chocolate and coffee, smoothly balanced with bitter, sweet and roasted notes.
  • Aroma: Hints of roasted coffee and chocolate
  • Guinness 0 boasts the same deliciously smooth taste, perfectly balanced flavor. Hints of chocolate and coffee, smoothly balanced with bitter, sweet and roasted notes
  • This Non-Alc stout features the same dark, ruby red liquid and creamy head with hints of chocolate and coffee smoothly balanced with bitter, sweet and roasted notes
  • For a perfect pour every time, just chill and pour into a glass at 45 degrees until it’s three-quarters full, then let the surge settle before filling to the top. Then enjoy
  • Bring Guinness 0 and share a pint with your friends at your next party, barbecue, or celebration. Plus, elevate your cooking by using it as a marinade, or add as an intriguing ingredient to your favorite meal or dessert

title: Egg Free Dressing & Sandwich Spread Plant Based Vegan
description:
For a great tasting alternative to traditional mayonnaise made from 100% plant-based ingredients. Hellmann's Plant Based Egg Free Spread & Dressing is all you need to turn what looks like an everyday meal into an epic vegan dish. Turn nothing into something, with just a bit of creativity and a dollop of our sauce. Hellmann's can help you transform your meals into something truly delicious. Enjoy the unmistakably amazing taste of Hellmann's Plant Based Mayo Style Spread & Dressing, knowing that it's packed with quality ingredients in a certified vegan recipe with no compromise on taste or texture. This condiment is free from trans fat and low in saturated fat, has no cholesterol, is gluten-free, with no artificial flavours, it's plant based and a source of omega-3 polyunsaturates, it's the perfect condiment for vegan burgers, fries and sandwiches that you can feel good about serving to your friends and family. We've removed the eggs, but not the original taste you love about our spread. The bottle is made from 100% recycled plastic. There is no denying that food waste is a huge problem. Our goal is to show that ingredients commonly left-behind in the back of your fridge can be transformed into something new. With Hellmann's, you can create exciting dishes with real taste for less waste.

  • Hellmann's Plant Based Dressing & Sandwich Spread is our rich & creamy tasting alternative to traditional mayonnaise made from 100% plant-based ingredients.

  • Hellmann's Plant Based is a source of omega-3 polyunsaturates, making it a perfect addition to vegan burgers, fries, and sandwiches.
  • Use Hellmann's to whip up a vegan dressing, make a delicious sandwich, or even a creamy pasta sauce. Try elevating your meals with inspiration from a recipe on Hellmann's website.
  • This condiment is also available in a 340ml squeeze bottle. It's creamy, delicious, and the best mayo alternative for anyone following a vegan diet or looking to try something new.

BARILLA Elbows pasta is made with non-GMO ingredients.At BARILLA, we're passionate about pasta. After all, we have been pasta makers since 1877. title: Mineral Water
description:
Embrace the spirit of Italian living with S.Pellegrino Sparkling Natural Mineral Water. Since its foundation in 1899, the S.Pellegrino brand has been synonymous with effortless style and Italian culture. S.Pellegrino bottles only the finest mineral water that goes through a 30-year journey through the earth in the San Pellegrino Terme area at the foothills of the Italian Alps. This journey mineralizes the water through contact with underground rocks, naturally enriching S.Pellegrino with mineral salts, calcium, and magnesium. The addition of carbon dioxide enhances S. Pellegrino, providing its unmistakable taste and sublte bubbles. Low in sodium and zero calories, S.Pellegrino has no artificial colors, flavors, or sweeteners. The 750mL plastic bottle size is BPA Free and are the perfect for lunch with coworkers or a quick bite on the go, and the convenient 24 pack ensures you’ll always have S. Pellegrino on hand. Whether you’re meeting friends out for a meal, exploring the town, or enjoying dinner at home S.Pellegrino is the perfect mineral water for all of life’s delicious moments. The clean taste and crisp carbonation of S.Pellegrino perfectly complements the flavors of all foods, including spicy appetizers, rich entrees and decadent desserts. S.Pellegrino's effervescence and subtle bubbles bring out the best in every dish, making it a favorite of some of the world's best chefs, gourmets and foodies. S.Pellegrino embodies the essence of Italian life - the cheerful outlook and the joy of spending time together while food, laughter and conversation are shared. Simply open a bottle of S.Pellegrino Sparkling Natural Mineral Water to Enhance Your Moments.

  • Imported from Italy and embraces the Italian way of living; its taste is clean and refreshing with medium-size bubbles
  • Naturally filtered by the Italian alps during a 30-year underground journey; no artificial colors or flavors
  • The best bottled water for wines and food pairings; perfect for cleansing the palate and amplifying subtle flavors
  • Twelve 750mL plastic bottles

title: Neapolitan Frozen Dessert

An absolute must in every freezer, it's the perfect sweet treat or snack for every day of the week.

Breyers has been a staple in Canadian freezers for over 30 years. When you buy Breyers, you know you are buying a dessert that uses the highest quality ingredients in all our ice cream and frozen dessert recipes.

In 1866, William Breyer took his passion for creating high-quality desserts and set out to start his very own brand of ice cream – Breyers. Thanks to his commitment to delivering delicious ice cream using only local and simple ingredients, the Breyers brand was soon loved by customers far and wide! Today, Breyers has committed to using flavours and colours from only natural sources, sustainably farmed fruit and vanilla, and Canadian dairy. Breyers is proudly crafted in Simcoe, Ontario, using 100% Canadian Dairy.

  • Breyers Family Classic Neapolitan Frozen dessert is made with rich cocoa, natural vanilla and natural flavours for a classic taste the whole family will love.

  • All Breyers ice cream and frozen desserts are proudly made in Canada, at our creamery in Simcoe, Ontario
